untranslatable_reason: Broadening pattern with intraformation loops requires multi-bar pattern recognition (trend line identification, loop detection, breakout failures) which cannot be expressed using only single-bar price/indicator comparisons. The signal requires detection of: (1) expanding upper/lower trend lines, (2) small loops hanging from trend lines, (3) failed breakout attempts, and (4) pattern re-crossings. These are chart pattern properties that need custom pattern detection logic beyond the allowed indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex chart pattern (Broadening Formation) with specific intraformation behavior. Attempted proxy using Bollinger Bands to represent range expansion and reversals, but this does not capture the true signal mechanics: trend line divergence, loop formations, and failed breakout patterns. A custom pattern detector or higher-level chart pattern library would be required for accurate implementation.
